name: parallel-audit
description: Event-driven multi-agent parallel audit of agent-instruction markdown files (CLAUDE.md / CLAUDE.local.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md / SKILL.md) for HIGH-severity quality issues. Dispatches N independent subagents (default N=3), aggregates findings by reproducibility threshold, filters shared blind spots, classifies redundancy against defaults or sibling skills, and proposes targeted fixes via per-fix user approval. Designed as a diagnostic tool for specific symptoms (post-refactor verification, rule that is being ignored, behavior drift), not for routine maintenance. Successor to claude-md-parallel-audit + skill-md-parallel-audit, unified under a single target_type parameter.
